---
title: "Kyle Tolliver"
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse, knitr)
```

![](./site_libs/images/me.png)

## About Me

BYU-Idaho Senior studying Software Engineering and Data Science. I am also working toward a Computer Engineering minor. Expected graduation in December of 2020. I love to learn new things and solve problems.

<!-- ### Quick Facts -->

<!-- * [Research Specialist Intern at Lawrence Livermore National Labs](./work.html#Research_Specialist_-_Intern) -->
<!-- *  -->
<!-- * Eagle Scout  -->

## Contact Me

* Email: [kyle@tollivers.org](mailto:kyle@tollivers.org?subject=Portfolio)
* Phone: [(805) 367-6723](tel:18053676723)
* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kctolli/  
* Github: https://github.com/kctolli

<!-- <br />  -->

<hr />

## Posts

* [Data Science Coursework](./Data-Science/index.html)
* [COVID-19 Research and Consulting](https://kctolli.github.io/COVID-19/index.html)
* [Web Design and Development](https://wdd-100-dry.glitch.me/)
* [Digital System Design Coursework](https://ecen-340.glitch.me/)
* [Senior Design Project](https://ecen499-nasa.github.io/)

<!-- <br />  -->

<hr />

###### *--- [Licensed](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io/blob/master/LICENSE) under [GNU General Public License v3.0](./site_libs/LICENSE.txt)*

######  *--- Website is made using [Rstudio](https://rstudio.com/) with [Rmd](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/index.html) and [Yaml](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io/blob/master/_site.yml) files *

######  *--- Hosted on [github](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io)*
